name: research-toolkit-skills
description: Cross-journal author workflow toolkit: pick the venue (journal-match across 185+ packs), run the analysis through the StatsPAI / Stata MCP execution bridge, self-check submission readiness, rehearse a calibrated referee panel, draft the point-by-point response, and assemble a Data-Editor replication package. Venue-neutral; reads each target pack's skills + official-source-map for the venue bar and live facts. Pairs with the per-journal depth packs.
